description: 用于分析绩效奖励脚本(MeritRewardV5.groovy)中计算amount值的各个环节，包括SQL查询和计算过程

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 根据ERP查询用户绩效奖励数据
taskTemplates.queryTemplate: select sum(expense_cost) as amt from performance_reward_user where business_day = '{{business_day}}' and erp = '{{erp}}' and source = 40

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 根据岗位编码查询绩效奖励数据
taskTemplates.queryTemplate: select sum(expense_cost) / COUNT(id) AS amt from performance_reward_user where business_day = '{{business_day}}' and ps_code = '{{ps_code}}' AND position_name = '{{position_name}}' AND nature = '{{nature}}' and source = 40

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 分析非O岗位员工的绩效奖励计算逻辑
taskTemplates.queryTemplate:
非O岗位员工计算逻辑：
1. 获取当月考勤自然天数(totalNatureDaysCount)
2. 获取考勤开始日期到业务日期相差的自然日天数(naturalDayCount)
3. 计算日均值：lastAvg = (rewardAmount / totalNatureDaysCount).setScale(2, RoundingMode.UP)
4. 应用封顶逻辑：供应链下OST人员，大件DC为800，其他为400
5. 计算最终金额：amount = (lastAvg * naturalDayCount).setScale(2, RoundingMode.UP)
6. 应用调整系数：amount = rewardAdjust(month, amount, MeritRewardAdjustEnum.LAST_MONTH_ACTUAL)

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 分析O岗位员工的绩效奖励计算逻辑
taskTemplates.queryTemplate:
O岗位员工计算逻辑：
1. 获取上月出勤天数(lastMonthAttendance)
2. 获取当月出勤天数(currentAttendanceDay)
3. 计算日均值：lastAvg = (rewardAmount / lastMonthAttendance).setScale(2, RoundingMode.UP)
4. 应用封顶逻辑：供应链下OST人员，大件DC为800，其他为400
5. 计算最终金额：amount = (lastAvg * currentAttendanceDay).setScale(2, RoundingMode.UP)
6. 应用调整系数：amount = rewardAdjust(month, amount, MeritRewardAdjustEnum.LAST_MONTH_ACTUAL)

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 分析历史均值计算逻辑(兜底方案)
taskTemplates.queryTemplate:
历史均值计算逻辑：
1. 调用calculate方法获取历史均值
2. 应用调整系数：amount = rewardAdjust(month, amount, MeritRewardAdjustEnum.PREVIOUS_MONTH_MEAN)

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 分析特殊岗位处理逻辑
taskTemplates.queryTemplate:
特殊岗位处理逻辑：
1. BG2037岗位直接返回0
2. MPT人员考勤使用自然天逻辑
3. 供应链下OST人员封顶逻辑

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 分析绩效奖励调整系数逻辑
taskTemplates.queryTemplate:
绩效奖励调整系数逻辑：
1. 从cfg_merit_coefficient表获取调整系数
2. 应用调整系数：amount = (amount * adjust.getAdjustCoefficient()).setScale(2, RoundingMode.UP)
